news.summary: Our guest this week is Darragh O'Brien, Ireland's Minister for Climate, Energy and the Environment and Minister for Transport. In his position, O'Brien has been directly involved in dealing with the fallout of the Middle East crisis, especially rising energy costs.

news.headline: 36 countries approve creation of special Ukraine tribunal to prosecute Russia
news.summary: Thirty-four European states – along with Australia and Costa Rica – said Friday they would join a proposed special tribunal for Ukraine. The future legal body would allow Kyiv to prosecute Russia for a "crime of aggression" over its invasion.

news.headline: India and UAE sign defence pacts, as Iran war tensions simmer
news.summary: A deal inked during Modi's visit to the UAE focuses on maritime security, cyberdefence, and military collaboration.
